items.name_cn:
『Burberry』
New🌟BURBERR Burberry Crossbody Bag, crafted from selected two-tone canvas and smooth calfskin. Decorated with a lock inspired by the Thomas Burberry logo. Easily transforms from a crossbody to a handbag. Removable adjustable leather crossbody strap-1 exterior pocket; 1 interior pocket-1 interior compartment-top flap with lock design-hand-painted edges-glossy metal hardware.
Model: 5886#
Dimensions: 21x 6x 16cm

items.name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
👑 Spring/Summer New Arrival BESACE TRIOMPHE, a VVIP latest style and pre-order from the official website
Style No.: Size: 24.5×17x4cm, Chain Length: 30cm
Triomphe Black & Gold BESACE TRIOMPHE glossy calfskin chain. Overall Style: Very grand. Black & Gold is still the classic, so gorgeous.
#Length has been increased, so it won't feel like a shoulder bag anymore.
Weight isn't light, but acceptable. The bag body uses hard calfskin with plenty of capacity for a phone, powder, tissues, and earphones!
Wear it with a motorcycle leather jacket, it's just too cool. Go for it.

items.name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
Celin* Style No. 8001 [Embroidery Series] Love it! The embroidery series is here for the shoulder bag~ It has a different vibe from the Monogram, I love them both~ This popular shoulder bag is super versatile. The shape is retro, chic, and a little cute. Super exquisite and compact ♡
I've always loved C E L I NE. This minimalist style is retro and trendy. This mid-century bag is lightweight, spacious, and easy to match. Do you like it?
Size: 25x14x7cm
